glosses.en: lost and found; lost property office
glosses.es: oficina de objetos perdidos; oficina de objetos extraviados
glosses.fr: bureau des objets trouvés; service des objets trouvés
glosses.it: ufficio oggetti smarriti; ufficio oggetti ritrovati
glosses.zh-Hans: 失物招领处; 失物招领中心
glosses.yue: 失物認領處; 失物招領處
glosses.pt: achados e perdidos; setor de achados e perdidos
glosses.he: מחלקת אבידות ומציאות; לשכת אבידות ומציאות
glosses.tr: kayıp eşya bürosu; kayıp eşya ofisi
glosses.vi: phòng đồ thất lạc; bộ phận đồ thất lạc
glosses.nl: afdeling gevonden voorwerpen; bureau gevonden voorwerpen
glosses.hu: talált tárgyak osztálya; talált tárgyak irodája
glosses.hi: गुमशुदा सामान विभाग; गुमशुदा वस्तुओं का कार्यालय
glosses.pl: biuro rzeczy znalezionych; dział rzeczy znalezionych
glosses.id: bagian barang hilang; kantor barang hilang
glosses.ro: birou de obiecte pierdute; birou de obiecte găsite
glosses.cs: ztráty a nálezy; kancelář ztrát a nálezů
glosses.ja: 遺失物取扱所; 落とし物センター

translations.en: I’m going to the lost and found.
translations.es: Voy a la oficina de objetos perdidos.
translations.fr: Je vais au bureau des objets trouvés.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đến quầy đồ thất lạc.
translations.nl: Ik ga naar de gevonden voorwerpen.
translations.hi: मैं खोया-पाया दफ्तर जा रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya mau ke bagian barang hilang.
translations.ro: Merg la biroul de obiecte pierdute.
translations.ja: 忘れ物センターに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; denotes motion toward a goal.
Preposition 'zu' contracted with definite article 'dem' (dative); marks destination and governs dative.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase with 'zu(m)'; dative object of the preposition.

translations.en: My backpack is at the lost and found.
translations.es: Mi mochila está en la oficina de objetos perdidos.
translations.fr: Mon sac à dos est au bureau des objets trouvés.
translations.it: Il mio zaino è all’ufficio oggetti smarriti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的背包在失物招领处。
translations.yue: 我個背囊喺失物認領處度。
translations.pt: Minha mochila está no achados e perdidos.
translations.he: התרמיל שלי נמצא במחלקת אבידות ומציאות.
translations.vi: Ba lô của tôi đang ở quầy đồ thất lạc.
translations.ar: حقيبة ظهري موجودة في قسم المفقودات.
translations.nl: Mijn rugzak ligt bij de gevonden voorwerpen.
translations.hu: A hátizsákom a talált tárgyak irodájában van.
translations.hi: मेरा बैग खोया-पाया दफ्तर में है.
translations.pl: Mój plecak jest w biurze rzeczy znalezionych.
translations.el: Το σακίδιό μου είναι στο γραφείο απολεσθέντων.
translations.id: Ransel saya ada di bagian barang hilang.
translations.ro: Rucsacul meu este la biroul de obiecte pierdute.
translations.cs: Můj batoh je na ztrátách a nálezech.
translations.ja: 私のリュックは忘れ物センターにあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Rucksack'; agrees with the noun in case (nominative here).
Common noun; subject of the clause; nominative singular.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; denotes a static location state.
Preposition 'in' contracted with definite article 'dem' (dative); indicates static location; governs dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im'; dative; denotes the location.

translations.en: We’re asking at the lost and found.
translations.es: Vamos a preguntar en la oficina de objetos perdidos.
translations.fr: On va demander au bureau des objets trouvés.
translations.it: Andiamo a chiedere all’ufficio oggetti smarriti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在失物招领处询问。
translations.yue: 我哋喺失物認領處問緊。
translations.pt: Estamos perguntando no achados e perdidos.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang hỏi ở quầy đồ thất lạc.
translations.nl: We vragen bij de gevonden voorwerpen.
translations.hi: हम खोया-पाया दफ्तर में पूछ रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang bertanya di bagian barang hilang.
translations.ro: Întrebăm la biroul de obiecte pierdute.
translations.cs: Ptáme se na ztrátách a nálezech.
translations.ja: 私たちは忘れ物センターで聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present indicative; with the separable particle 'nach' forms the verb 'nachfragen' (to inquire).
Preposition 'in' contracted with definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im'; dative; location complement.
Separable verbal particle of 'nachfragen'; surfaces clause-finally; links with 'fragen' to form the full verb lexeme.

sentences.target: Das Fundbüro hat heute schon geschlossen.

translations.de: Das Fundbüro hat heute schon geschlossen.
translations.en: The lost and found is already closed today.
translations.es: La oficina de objetos perdidos ya cerró hoy.
translations.fr: Le bureau des objets trouvés est déjà fermé aujourd’hui.
translations.it: L’ufficio oggetti smarriti è già chiuso per oggi.
translations.ko: 분실물 센터는 오늘 벌써 문을 닫았어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 失物招领处今天已经关门了。
translations.yue: 失物認領處今日已經關門咗。
translations.pt: O achados e perdidos já fechou hoje.
translations.he: מחלקת אבידות ומציאות כבר סגורה היום.
translations.tr: Kayıp eşya bürosu bugün zaten kapalı.
translations.vi: Quầy đồ thất lạc hôm nay đã đóng cửa rồi.
translations.nl: De afdeling gevonden voorwerpen is vandaag al gesloten.
translations.hu: A talált tárgyak irodája ma már zárva van.
translations.hi: खोया-पाया दफ्तर आज पहले ही बंद है.
translations.pl: Biuro rzeczy znalezionych jest dziś już zamknięte.
translations.el: Το γραφείο απολεσθέντων είναι ήδη κλειστό σήμερα.
translations.nb: Hittegodskontoret er allerede stengt i dag.
translations.id: Bagian barang hilang hari ini sudah tutup.
translations.sv: Hittegodsavdelningen är redan stängd i dag.
translations.ro: Biroul de obiecte pierdute este deja închis astăzi.
translations.cs: Ztráty a nálezy jsou dnes už zavřené.
translations.da: Hittegodskontoret er allerede lukket i dag.
translations.ja: 忘れ物センターは今日はもう閉まっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; determiner of 'Fundbüro'; nominative singular marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; forms the present perfect with the participle 'geschlossen'.
Temporal adverb; indicates the time of the event.
Degree/temporal adverb; emphasizes that the closing occurred earlier than expected.
Past participle (Partizip II) of 'schließen'; main lexical verb in a perfect construction with 'hat'.
